reason: The tweet expresses support for Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, the former leader of ISIS, and claims that 90% of the people in Saudi Arabia have pledged allegiance to him and are awaiting his arrival.
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
original_post: شباب ترى قسم بالله كل هذولي مباحث ترى 90% من شعب بلاد الحرمين مبايعين لأبو بكر البغدآدي وينتظرو دخوله
